name: how-to-setup-local-ollama-with-claude-code
description: 🚀 Complete guide to setting up Claude Code with free local Ollama on macOS - no API keys, no billing
author: Rob Brennan <rob@sploosh.ai>

scripts.check:gemma4: ollama list | grep -q 'gemma4-26b' || npm run model:create:gemma4
scripts.check:gemma4-e4b: ollama list | grep -q 'gemma4-e4b' || npm run model:create:gemma4-e4b
scripts.check:gemma4-12b: ollama list | grep -q 'gemma4:12b' || ollama pull gemma4:12b
scripts.check:gpt-oss: ollama list | grep -q 'gpt-oss:20b' || ollama pull gpt-oss:20b
scripts.check:qwen: ollama list | grep -q 'qwen2.5-coder:7b' || ollama pull qwen2.5-coder:7b
scripts.check:qwen3.5: ollama list | grep -q 'qwen3.5:9b' || ollama pull qwen3.5:9b
scripts.telemetry:all: npm run telemetry:node-exporter:ensure && npm run telemetry:gpu:setup && npm run telemetry:gpu:start && npm run telemetry:down && npm run telemetry:start && npm run telemetry:launch
scripts.telemetry:down: cd examples/claude-code-telemetry && docker-compose down && npm run telemetry:gpu:stop
scripts.telemetry:gpu:setup: if [ "$(uname -s)" = "Darwin" ]; then chmod +x examples/claude-code-telemetry/scripts/setup-gpu-metrics.sh && examples/claude-code-telemetry/scripts/setup-gpu-metrics.sh; else echo 'ℹ️  Skipping GPU setup (not macOS)'; fi
scripts.telemetry:gpu:start: if [ "$(uname -s)" = "Darwin" ]; then chmod +x examples/claude-code-telemetry/scripts/start-gpu-exporter.sh && examples/claude-code-telemetry/scripts/start-gpu-exporter.sh /tmp/node-exporter-textfile; else echo 'ℹ️  Skipping GPU exporter (not macOS)'; fi
scripts.telemetry:gpu:status: pgrep -f apple-silicon-gpu-exporter.py > /dev/null && echo '✅ GPU exporter is running' || echo '❌ GPU exporter is not running'
scripts.telemetry:gpu:stop: pkill -f apple-silicon-gpu-exporter.py 2>/dev/null && echo '✅ GPU exporter stopped' || echo 'ℹ️  GPU exporter was not running'
scripts.telemetry:node-exporter:ensure: if [ "$(uname -s)" = "Darwin" ]; then (brew list node_exporter &>/dev/null || (echo '📦 Installing node_exporter...' && brew install node_exporter)) && npm run telemetry:node-exporter:start; else echo 'ℹ️  Skipping node_exporter (not macOS) - system metrics unavailable on this platform'; fi
scripts.telemetry:node-exporter:install: brew install node_exporter && echo '✅ node_exporter installed. Run: npm run telemetry:node-exporter:start'
scripts.telemetry:node-exporter:start: mkdir -p /tmp/node-exporter-textfile && brew services stop node_exporter 2>/dev/null; pkill -f 'node_exporter --collector.textfile' 2>/dev/null; nohup $(brew --prefix)/bin/node_exporter --collector.textfile.directory=/tmp/node-exporter-textfile --web.listen-address=:9100 >/tmp/node-exporter.log 2>&1 & echo $! > /tmp/node-exporter.pid && echo '✅ node_exporter started on :9100 (macOS + GPU textfile metrics enabled)'
scripts.telemetry:node-exporter:status: pgrep -f 'node_exporter --collector.textfile' > /dev/null && echo '✅ node_exporter is running with textfile collector' || echo '❌ node_exporter is not running'
scripts.telemetry:node-exporter:stop: pkill -f 'node_exporter --collector.textfile' 2>/dev/null; rm -f /tmp/node-exporter.pid; brew services stop node_exporter 2>/dev/null; echo '✅ node_exporter stopped'
scripts.telemetry:launch:claude:gemma4: source examples/claude-code-telemetry/.env && ollama launch claude --model gemma4-26b
scripts.telemetry:launch:claude:gemma4-e4b: source examples/claude-code-telemetry/.env && ollama launch claude --model gemma4-e4b
scripts.telemetry:launch:claude:gemma4-12b: source examples/claude-code-telemetry/.env && ollama launch claude --model gemma4:12b
scripts.telemetry:launch:claude:gpt-oss: source examples/claude-code-telemetry/.env && ollama launch claude --model gpt-oss:20b
scripts.telemetry:launch:claude:qwen3.5:9b: source examples/claude-code-telemetry/.env && ollama launch claude --model qwen3.5:9b
scripts.telemetry:setup: cp examples/claude-code-telemetry/.env.example examples/claude-code-telemetry/.env && echo '✅ Created .env file from .env.example'
scripts.telemetry:start: npm run telemetry:setup && npm run telemetry:up
scripts.telemetry:up: cd examples/claude-code-telemetry && (test -f .env || (echo '❌ ERROR: .env file not found!' && echo '❌ Run: npm run telemetry:setup' && exit 1)) && docker-compose up -d && ./verify-telemetry.sh
scripts.model:build:gemma4: npm run model:create:gemma4 && ollama launch claude --model gemma4-26b
scripts.model:build:gemma4-e4b: npm run model:create:gemma4-e4b && ollama launch claude --model gemma4-e4b
scripts.model:create:gemma4: (ollama list | grep -q 'gemma4:26b-a4b-it-q8_0' || ollama pull gemma4:26b-a4b-it-q8_0) && ollama create gemma4-26b -f modelfiles/gemma4-26b.Modelfile
scripts.model:create:gemma4-e4b: (ollama list | grep -q 'gemma4:e4b-it-q8_0' || ollama pull gemma4:e4b-it-q8_0) && ollama create gemma4-e4b -f modelfiles/gemma4-e4b.Modelfile
scripts.ollama:restart: launchctl setenv OLLAMA_FLASH_ATTENTION 1 && launchctl setenv OLLAMA_KV_CACHE_TYPE q8_0 && killall Ollama; sleep 1 && open -a Ollama && echo 'Ollama restarted with flash_attention and kv_cache_type=q8_0'
scripts.start:gemma4: npm run check:gemma4 && ollama launch claude --model gemma4-26b
scripts.start:gemma4-e4b: npm run check:gemma4-e4b && ollama launch claude --model gemma4-e4b
scripts.start:gemma4-12b: npm run check:gemma4-12b && ollama launch claude --model gemma4:12b
scripts.start:gpt-oss: npm run check:gpt-oss && ollama launch claude --model gpt-oss:20b
scripts.start:qwen: npm run check:qwen && ollama launch claude --model qwen2.5-coder:7b
scripts.start:qwen3.5: npm run check:qwen3.5 && ollama launch claude --model qwen3.5:9b
